Off-White Graffiti Arrow Street Loose Round Neck Short Sleeve T-shirt
Colors: Black, White
Sizes: S-XL
Fabric: Custom double yarn high-density pure cotton fabric
Craftsmanship: Precision embossing, three-needle five-thread craftsmanship for a textured and high-quality finish, ensuring consistency with the original version
Accessories: Complete set of Off-White original counter accessories, consistent with the original version label, washing instructions, tags, complete packaging
Cut: Oversized loose fit, suitable for both men and women
Off-White was founded by the talented Virgil Abloh. This American designer, who holds a master's degree in architecture, is also a DJ and the creative director for Kanye West. He has amazed many with his urban luxury style and his ability to interpret contemporary fashion elegantly, creating highly sought-after pieces.
[Correct version, oversized fit is very large]

Item number OW款, color: black, gray. Off-White's runway knit fuzzy loose round neck sweater. Ordered the original version, took a month to produce, finally shipped. Absolutely love it, looks super cool when worn. A TikTok influencer mentioned that the new OW releases will become a future trend. Just look at street style photos, celebrities are treating it as a collectible sweater, a must-have for both men and women in casual luxury fashion. Developed the highest version across the entire internet, took months from pattern making to production, customizing all accessories, high-end and classy! The entire garment is made of imported machine-knitted pure cotton yarn, with machine-knitted jacquard logo, perfectly combining craftsmanship and quality. Available in sizes M, L, XL, XXL.

#swy🐉🐉 Item number Y OFF WHITE CO VIRGIL FW bomber jacket with aircraft lettering. Combining woolen body and leather sleeves, featuring high elasticity silk thread weaving and German imported machine-woven wool jacquard pattern. Made of skin-friendly cotton with a three-dimensional feel, injecting a fashionable trend into the classic silhouette. Crafted with imported U leather, exquisite pleats, and meticulous hand-cutting. The patchwork of leather is meticulously positioned, showcasing the craftsmanship. Custom-made with clear and perfect lettering, exuding a high-end and classy vibe. The entire garment is exclusively customized with meticulous craftsmanship. Towel patch embroidery involves embroidering each pattern on felt, laser engraving with infrared light, and then fixing with a sewing machine, perfectly combining craftsmanship and embroidery. Precise stitching, unisex design, with solid and durable stitching. Metal washing label accessories. Can be styled for both mature and youthful looks. Available in sizes S-XL.

🔥OFF WHITE SS new spring/summer short-sleeve, top version custom-made with pure cotton fabric. Simple and stylish design with great color matching. Classic logo design, simple and elegant style, full of high-end feel, suitable for all seasons. European style, clean and atmospheric, same style available on official website. Colors: black, white. Sizes: S-XXL (please provide height and weight when ordering)....

Item code Y OFF WHITE CO VIRGIL FW military letter baseball jacket, featuring a blend of woolen body and leather sleeves, with high elasticity ribbed texture. Imported German horizontal machine woven wool jacquard pattern, cotton skin-friendly, full three-dimensional sense, injecting a fashionable trend into classic silhouette. Made with imported U leather, impeccable texture with pleated wrinkles. Hand-cut and finely crafted, meticulous stitching of leather pieces. Customized with full set of accessories, clear and perfect letters, high-end and classy. The entire garment is exclusively customized with heavy craftsmanship. Towel patch embroidery, each pattern embroidered on felt first, then laser engraved with infrared light, fixed by sewing machine, perfectly combining craftsmanship and embroidery. Precise stitching, unisex design, solid and durable stitching, metal washed label accessories. Can match both mature and youthful styles. One size available: S-XL.

New arrival from OFF-WHITE, the popular FW series short-sleeve oversize design. Made of high-quality pure cotton active fabric, it is durable, colorfast, and does not shrink after washing.
